memoryArtifacts.headline: Connections among the royal Welsh dynasties.
Elystan Glodrydd arms: the middle one was used by his descendants; the three Boars’ heads are from the arms attributed to his son, Cadwgan.
The golden Lion Rampant Regardant on a red shield is the coat of arms retrospectively attributed to Elystan Glodrydd himself.
ELSTAN (or ELYSTAN) GLODRYDD, founder of the fifth of the 'royal tribes' of Wales

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin於大約0950年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾時，他的父親Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth44歲，母親Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire36歲。他與Gwenllian Ferch Einion在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1010年登記服兵役。他去世於1010年在英國威爾斯享年61歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾特雷利斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin于大约0950年出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾时，他的父亲Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth44岁，母亲Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire36岁。他与Gwenllian Ferch Einion在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1010年登记服兵役。他去世于1010年在英国威尔斯享年61岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾特雷利斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin was born about 0950, in Radnorshire, Wales, his father, Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth, was 44 and his mother, Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire, was 36. He married Gwenllian Ferch Einion in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1010. He died in 1010, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Trelystan, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin est né environ 0950, à Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian Ferch Einion à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1010. Il est décédé en 1010, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Trelystan, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin um 0950 in Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth 44 und seine Mutter Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire 36. Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Gwenllian Ferch Einion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1010 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1010 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Trelystan, Montgomeryshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin è nato il circa 0950 nel Radnorshire, Galles, il suo padre, Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian Ferch Einion nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1010. Morì nel 1010, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Trelystan, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelinが約0950年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builthは44歳，母Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshireは36歳であった。イギリスウェールズでGwenllian Ferch Einionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1010年に兵役登録をした。彼は1010年にイギリスウェールズで61歳で死去し，ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアトレリスタンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin(이)가 대략 0950년 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire(은)는 36세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Gwenllian Ferch Einion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1010년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1010년 영국 웨일스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몽고머이실르 트렐리스탠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin nasceu aproximadamente 0950, em Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian Ferch Einion em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1010. Ele faleceu em 1010, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Trelystan, Montgomeryshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin родился около 0950 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian Ferch Einion в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1010 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1010 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности трелистань, монтгомиришир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elystan Glodrydd Ap Cyhelin nació aproximadamente 0950, en Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Cuhelyn Ap Ifor Lord of Builth, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Rhiengar Gwen ferch Grono of Denbighshire, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Gwenllian Ferch Einion en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1010. Murió en 1010, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Trelystan, Montgomeryshire, Gales.
